name: Vijaysar
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Pitta.
mainMedicinalUses: Effectively controls high blood sugar levels.
Treats skin diseases and intestinal worms.
plantProfile: Drinking water kept in Vijaysar wood cups is a traditional diabetic remedy.
preparationMethods: Soak wood in water overnight and drink in the morning.
